commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Maintainers need to choose the setup trust/product boundary before an automated worker can safely repair this branch.; Needs attention: The diff introduces a new gateway-host command execution path and its environment handling is not aligned with the shared host execution security policy.; Review finding: [P1] Reuse the shared host env sanitizer — src/skills/lifecycle/setup.ts:115-148 - [P1] Wire setup throug... (sha=23caecc47d15819f350bd73e2c319ba8521bbf0a)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds `metadata.openclaw.setup` parsing, a setup-hook runner, installer/archive wiring, and tests for skill setup scripts.

PR surface: Source +281, Tests +298. Total +579 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a feature PR rather than a broken existing behavior report. Source review does give a high-confidence path to verify the merge blockers: inspect the final PR setup runner and compare it with current `skills.install`/`skills.update` routing and the shared host env policy.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainers need to choose the setup trust/product boundary before an automated worker can safely repair this branch.

target.title: fix #80213: [Feature]: Skill author-defined setup hook (run skill-supplied script on install/update)
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #80213.

- Add `metadata.openclaw.setup.script` support so skill packages can run a setup script after trusted install/update flows.
- Migrate the existing setup-hook PR logic onto the current `src/skills/*` lifecycle/loading structure after the skills subsystem split.
- Preserve the hardening from the existing PR: explicit archive trust gate, realpath confinement for symlink escapes, bounded timeout, and restricted environment forwarding.

## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior or issue addressed:** Skill authors can define `metadata.openclaw.setup.script` in `SKILL.md`; trusted install/update paths can opt in to running that script, while setup hooks remain disabled by default for archive installs and dangerous env vars are not forwarded.
- **Real environment tested:** Rebasing PR #80266 worktree `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/pr-80266` on current `origin/main`; Linux 4.19.112-2.el8.x86_64; Node via repository pnpm/tooling; evidence under `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-pr-80266-evidence`.
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch:** Ran `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-pr-80266-evidence/skill-setup-hook-proof.ts` with `pnpm --dir /media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/pr-80266 exec node --import tsx ...`; the proof installs a temporary skill through `installExtractedSkillRoot`, verifies the setup hook output persists in the final installed skill, verifies archive setup hooks are skipped unless `allowSetupHooks` is true, verifies allowlisted `requires.env` forwarding, verifies `NODE_OPTIONS` and `OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN` are blocked, and verifies a symlinked setup script escaping the skill directory is rejected. Also ran targeted Vitest and core test typecheck.
- **Evidence after fix:** `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-pr-80266-evidence/skill-setup-hook-proof-final.log`; `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-pr-80266-evidence/vitest-skills-setup-lifecycle-final.log`; `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-pr-80266-evidence/tsgo-core-test-final.log`; `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-pr-80266-evidence/check-main-drift.json`; `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-pr-80266-evidence/check-upstream-fixed.json`.
- **Observed result after fix:** Runtime proof reports `installWithHookOk: true`, `hookRan: true`, `hookKind: "install"`, `hookOutputPersistedInFinalTarget: true`, `allowedEnvForwarded: true`, `nodeOptionsBlocked: true`, `gatewayTokenBlocked: true`, `defaultGateSkippedHook: true`, and `symlinkEscapeBlocked: true`. Targeted Vitest reports 3 files / 28 tests passed, and `tsgo:core:test` completed successfully.
- **What was not tested:** A live published ClawHub skill containing setup metadata was not installed; the proof uses a temporary local skill directory through the real lifecycle install/setup functions so it does not depend on publishing an external skill.
- **Target test file:** `src/skills/lifecycle/setup.test.ts`, `src/skills/loading/frontmatter.test.ts`, `src/skills/lifecycle/install.test.ts`, `src/skills/lifecycle/archive-install.test.ts`

## Regression Test Plan

- `pnpm --dir /media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/pr-80266 exec node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit.config.ts src/skills/lifecycle/setup.test.ts src/skills/loading/frontmatter.test.ts src/skills/lifecycle/install.test.ts src/skills/lifecycle/archive-install.test.ts`
- `pnpm --dir /media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/pr-80266 tsgo:core:test`

## Root Cause

- **Root cause:** Skill install had no post-install setup-hook mechanism, and the original PR implementation targeted the old `src/agents/skills*` layout that main has since moved into `src/skills/*`. The updated branch ports the setup metadata parsing and secure hook execution into the current lifecycle/loading modules.
- **Missing detection / guardrail:** Prior code lacked a setup-hook regression path covering real install staging, trust gating, env filtering, and symlink escape rejection in the current skills subsystem layout.
target.author: zhangguiping-xydt

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge

commands.author: zhangguiping-xydt
